collegeName: KAKINADA INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY

hero.headline: Empowering future
hero.tagline: Andhra Pradesh's Premier Innovation Hub. Integrating AI, Robotics, and Entrepreneurship into every degree.

campusSpotlight.title: Annual Tech Fest
campusSpotlight.summary: Hackathons, expos, and cultural night — a week the whole campus looks forward to.
campusSpotlight.body: Add a longer story here in admin: judges, prizes, student teams, and photos from the event.

campusSpotlight.title: Industry on campus
campusSpotlight.summary: Leaders from partner companies visit for talks and live problem-solving sessions.
campusSpotlight.body: Describe sessions, student takeaways, and follow-up internships or projects.

branches.name: Artificial Intelligence
branches.blurb: Learn how machines sense patterns, make decisions, and assist people in healthcare, farming, and industry — in simple, practical projects from year one.

branches.name: AI & Machine Learning
branches.blurb: Build models that learn from data: recommendations, vision, and language — with labs that feel like real product teams.

branches.name: Data Science
branches.blurb: Turn raw numbers into decisions: visual stories, forecasting, and responsible use of data for business and society.

branches.name: AI & Data Science
branches.blurb: A blended path: AI intuition plus data discipline — ideal if you want both coding depth and analytics strength.

branches.name: Cyber Security
branches.blurb: Protect systems and people: ethical hacking basics, secure design, and the mindset to stay ahead of threats.

branches.name: Artificial Intelligence
branches.blurb: Deeper research orientation with seminars, publications, and industry-aligned thesis work.

branches.name: AI & Machine Learning
branches.blurb: Advanced ML pipelines, deployment, and evaluation for production-grade systems.

branches.name: Data Science
branches.blurb: Statistical rigour, big-data tooling, and storytelling for leadership decisions.

branches.name: AI & Data Science
branches.blurb: Combine research methods in AI with large-scale data engineering practice.

branches.name: Cyber Security
branches.blurb: Network defence, incident response, and secure architecture at postgraduate depth.

branches.name: MCA
branches.blurb: Software engineering, systems design, and IT management for versatile tech careers.

branches.name: MBA
branches.blurb: Management foundations with analytics and communication — for roles that bridge tech and business.

branches.name: Computer Engineering (CME)
branches.blurb: Hands-on programming, hardware basics, and workplace readiness in three focused years.

clubs.title: Public Speaking

difference.title: KIOT
difference.teaser: Industrial tours that make theory real.
difference.body: Regular visits to technology parks and production floors so you see how engineers actually work.

difference.title: Teach to Learn
difference.body: Short teaching slots build confidence and deep understanding — when you can teach it, you truly know it.

difference.title: Micro-Leadership
difference.teaser: Small teams, student leads, real ownership.
difference.body: Classes split into agile groups with rotating managers so leadership becomes a habit, not a final-year crash course.

difference.title: Skill Workshops
difference.teaser: Weekly hands-on labs led by peers and mentors.
difference.body: Workshops on modern stacks and tools — from web and mobile to cloud — so your portfolio grows every semester.
